description: Aggregates tools from multiple MCP servers with unified BM25/regex search and deferred loading.

environmentVariables.description: Storage backend for tool cache. Use 'memory' for development or 'redis' for production.

environmentVariables.description: Redis connection URL. Required only when STORAGE_BACKEND=redis.

environmentVariables.description: Path to the server_config.json file listing downstream MCP servers.
